rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption. Educ. Code §12.262 governs adult education charter accountability and revocation. No overlap or interaction exists.
quote: The commissioner, in cooperation with the advisory committee established under Section 12.254, shall develop and adopt an accountability framework that establishes standards by which to measure the performance of an adult education program operated under a charter granted under this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
